2606.11874.title: AutoMine Solution for AV2 2026 Scenario Mining Challenge
2606.11874.paper_summary: With the development of autonomous driving systems, mining high-value, safety-critical, and planning-relevant scenarios from large-scale driving logs has become essential for data-driven evaluation. In this paper, we propose AutoMine, a robust self-refining scenario mining method based on LLMs and VLMs. AutoMine uses semantics-preserving prompt augmentation to reduce LLM prompt sensitivity, combines robust trajectory atomic functions with VLM-based functions to handle perception noise and open-world visual cues, and refines generated code through execution feedback from real logs. In the Argoverse 2 Scenario Mining Competition at CVPR 2026, AutoMine achieves a HOTA-Temporal score of 36.38 and a Timestamp BA score of 77.21.
2606.11874.paper_summary_zh: 隨著自動駕駛系統的發展，從大規模駕駛日誌中挖掘高價值、安全關鍵和規劃相關的場景已成為數據驅動評估的必要條件。<lb/>在本文中，我們提出了 AutoMine，一種基於 LLM 和 VLM 的穩健自我精煉場景挖掘方法。<lb/>AutoMine 使用保留語義的提示增強來減少 LLM 提示的敏感性，並結合穩健的軌跡原子函數與基於 VLM 的函數來處理感知噪聲和開放世界視覺線索，並通過來自真實日誌的執行反饋來精煉生成的代碼。<lb/>在 2026 年 CVPR 的 Argoverse 2 場景挖掘競賽中，AutoMine 實現了 36.38 的 HOTA-Temporal 分數和 77.21 的 Timestamp BA 分數。
2606.11874.author: Songliang Cao et.al.
2606.11874.authors: Songliang Cao, Jiele Zhao, Yuru Wang, Hao Li, Daqi Liu, Zehan Zhang, Fangzhen Li, Yu Wang, Yue Zhang, Bing Wang, Guang Chen, Hao Lu, Hangjun Ye
